text: 英語 聽力 模擬 視題
第一節
聽下面五段對話
每段對話後有一個小題
從題中所給的
A, B, C 三個選項中
選出最佳選項
聽完每段對話後
你都有十秒鐘的時間
來回答有關小題
和閱讀下一小題
每段對話僅讀一遍
現在
你有五秒鐘的時間
閱讀第一小題的有關內容
You have a meeting with Mr. Robertson at the cafe at 4 p.m.
There are only 20 minutes left
Why haven't you left for the cafe yet?
He had something to deal with
so the meeting has been put off by half an hour
Isn't the weather wonderful today?
The sky is so clear and blue
Yeah, it's quite nice
and the sun is shining brightly
It's perfect for having a picnic
and taking photos in the park
Excuse me, can you tell me
how to get to the nearest supermarket?
Sure, just go out of our hotel
then turn right,
walk about one kilometer
and you'll see a big theater
The supermarket is across from it
and I heard you went to the music festival last week
How was it?
Ugg, it was quite a disappointment
Before I went, I thought it would be amazing
but it was actually disorganized
with a confusing schedule
and long lines in the entry and the exit
Honey, remember to pack your breakfast
Okay, I have to go
This is my first day back to school
after my leg injury has been cured
I don't want to be late
All right, remember, don't run around in the classroom
The first step is to get to the end
The second step

The third step is to get to the nearest supermarket

每段對話或讀白,讀兩遍.
聽下面一段對話,回答第六和第七兩個小題.
現在,你有十秒鐘的時間閱讀這兩個小題.
Jack, how about going to the cinema together this weekend?
Sounds good. What type of movie do you want to watch? Action, comedy, documentary, or something else?
I'm in the mood for a comedy movie.
Comities can really help me relax. How about you?
I totally agree. It's perfect for a fun weekend.
So where shall we meet?
How about meeting at Sunset Restaurant, which is between Miracle Bookstore and Wonder Coffee Shop at 11 a.m. on Saturday?
The restaurant is near the grand cinema, so we can eat there and then walk to the cinema.
That's a good idea. I'm already looking forward to it.

現在你有十五秒鐘的時間閱讀著三個下題.
Sarah, welcome to my new home. I'm so glad you could come over.
Thanks for inviting me, Alex. Your new home is bright and the location is great.
Thanks. I'm really happy with how it turned out.
You should be, and I love the color scheme of your home.
I wanted to create a comfortable atmosphere, so I chose colors like blue for the living room walls and yellow for the bedroom walls.
The colors really work well, and I noticed some unique decorations like that cute little clay cat on the shelf.
Where did you get it?
I found it at a local craft fair.
I also have these handmade wooden picture frames from a second hand store and that old green clock from a yard sale.
They add a lot of character to your home.

I'd like to send a package.
Can you tell me where it's going to be sent?
Washington DC.
All right, and what's inside the package? Are there any fragile items like glass cups or food that can go bad easily?
Like fruit.
No. Just some clothes and a few books.
I see. Do you have any preference for the delivery service?
We have standard, express, and same-day options.
I'll go with the express service.
Okay. Now, please fill out this shipping form.
You'll need to provide the recipient's name, address, and contact number.
Sure. I'm done. Here you go.
Let me weigh the package to calculate the shipping cost.
It weighs 3.5 kilograms, so the shipping fee is $40.
Here's the shipping fee. Thanks a lot for your help.

Yes, I have. I'm planning to join the School's Debate Club.
I think it'll help me improve my public speaking skills and critical thinking.
How about you, John?

By the way, are you going to set any academic goals for the new year?
Certainly. I want to focus on improving my math grades.
I've been struggling a bit, so I plan to ask the math teacher for help and do more exercises.
I want to read more classic novels this year.
It'll be a good way to improve my writing skills.
Reading can also improve our concentration and patience,
and I'm considering volunteering more in the community.
I think it's important to give back to the community and help others.
Actually, I've been looking for some volunteer opportunities too.
There's a community center nearby that's always in need of volunteers.
Why don't we go and sign up together?
That's a great idea. Let's do it.

From birthdays to anniversaries and even going away presents,
there are many reasons to buy gifts for people throughout the year.
However, the customs of gift-giving vary across different parts of the world.
In many parts of the Middle East, gift-giving is important in both business and personal life.
But it's not a good idea for a man to buy a gift for a woman he doesn't know well.
And in Yemen and Saudi Arabia, gifts are only given between people who are already quite close.
You'll also need to think about how you wrap the gift.
For example, avoid using white in China or black and purple in South America as these colors are associated with death.
The way you give or receive a gift also varies.
In Ghana, gifts should be given with the right hand and the same is true in India and the Middle East.
In some Asian countries, including China, the person getting the gift might refuse it twice or three times before eventually accepting it.
This is thought to be a polite way of receiving a gift in some situations.
But perhaps the most important thing wherever you are in the world is the intention of your gift.
You want to show you care.
